description.ko: 완벽한 기하학이 하이테크 디지털 아티팩트와 단색의 복잡성에 의해 파괴되는 수학적 혼돈에 대한 시각적 연구입니다.
description.en: A visual study of mathematical chaos, where perfect geometry is disrupted by high-tech digital artifacts and monochrome complexity.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian monolith by KURO-X, titled 'The Recursive Fragmentation.' The structure is captured mid-shatter into a precision vortex of #808080 and #C0C0C0 geometric shards against a clinical #FFFFFF void. Intense digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration intersect the sharp polygonal planes. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian surfaces. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the mathematical beauty of digital chaos within structured order.
